AttributeList.Text: Inputs: Galileo -> PLC Outputs: PLC -> Galileo
Input Byte 0 Rearm power C0 cabinet + Facility status
Input Byte 1 External machine interface / general purpose inputs
Input Byte 2 Wrapping machine / Fast door control
Input Byte 3 Reset of safety zones
Output Byte 8 Power lines & safety zones disabled
Output Byte 9 Insulation monitor + Heated lines + Cabinet emergency stop status
Output Byte 11 PLC hardware combination number
